name: io.github.us-all/unifi
description: UniFi semantic-analysis MCP — fleet health, anomaly detection, cross-site analytics

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: UniFi Site Manager API base URL (default: https://api.ui.com).

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_KEY_OWNER
environmentVariables.description: Owner-role API key — enables 33 Cloud Connector tools for per-device/per-client deep data.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist. Default: all categories enabled.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_LOCAL_URL
environmentVariables.description: Local controller URL (e.g. https://10.10.1.1). Enables 2 local-only tools (get-port-errors, list-port-flap-summary) that surface per-port errors + SFP DDM the Cloud API does not expose. Requires LAN reachability.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_LOCAL_USER
environmentVariables.description: Controller local account username (required when UNIFI_LOCAL_URL set). Viewer/Limited-Admin role is sufficient.

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_LOCAL_PASS
environmentVariables.description: Controller local account password (required when UNIFI_LOCAL_URL set).

environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_LOCAL_INSECURE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to accept self-signed cert from the local controller (typical for UDM Pro).
